desc: Count characters, words, sentences, paragraphs with/without spaces
how_to: Paste or type text to see real-time character counts. Includes both with-space and without-space counts.

desc: Count total lines, non-empty lines, blank lines in text
how_to: Paste multi-line text to instantly see line statistics.

desc: Reverse text, reverse lines, reverse words order
how_to: Type or paste text and choose how to reverse it.

desc: Encode or decode URL strings, escape special chars
how_to: Paste URL text to encode or decode.

desc: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text
how_to: Select encode or decode mode, paste your text.

desc: Split text by delimiter (comma, space, custom) and join back
how_to: Choose delimiter, paste text, see split items. Join them back with another delimiter.

desc: Convert text to URL-friendly slugs
how_to: Type a title or phrase and see its URL slug version.

desc: Test regular expressions against text — live matching with highlights
how_to: Type a regex pattern and test text to see matches highlighted in real-time.

desc: Highlight differences between two text blocks — character-level and word-level
how_to: Paste two versions of text. Differences are highlighted inline.

desc: Remove extra spaces, tabs, newlines from text
how_to: Choose what to clean: extra spaces, leading/trailing whitespace, empty lines.

desc: Randomly shuffle lines or words in your text
how_to: Paste your text and shuffle lines or words randomly.

desc: Invert text case: uppercase→lowercase, lowercase→UPPERCASE randomly
how_to: Paste text and see case-inverted version instantly.

desc: Convert text to aLtErNaTiNg CaPs style
how_to: Type text to convert to alternating case.

desc: Convert HTML special chars to entities and back
how_to: Paste HTML text to encode entities like < > & or decode them back.

desc: Extract URLs, emails, phone numbers, hashtags from text
how_to: Paste text and select what to extract (URLs, emails, etc.). Results shown as a clean list.

desc: Add prefix/suffix to each line, or wrap text with custom strings
how_to: Type your prefix and suffix, paste lines to transform.

desc: Count how many times each word appears in your text
how_to: Paste text to see a frequency table sorted by count.

desc: Count each letter/character frequency in text
how_to: Paste text to see which letters appear most often.

desc: Extract all numbers from text — integers, decimals, prices
how_to: Paste text and extract all numeric values.

desc: Remove duplicates with options: case-insensitive, fuzzy match, keep first/last
how_to: Paste text and choose dedup mode: exact, case-insensitive, or fuzzy.

desc: Compare two pieces of text side by side, highlight differences line by line
how_to: Paste two texts and see differences highlighted.

desc: Combined text cleaning: remove non-printable chars, normalize spaces, fix encoding
how_to: Paste dirty text and click Clean. Handles multiple common text issues at once.

desc: Add sequential numbers to each line of text
how_to: Paste your list and choose number format: 1., (1), A., a., i., etc.

desc: Align text into fixed-width columns for clean formatting
how_to: Paste text and set column width. Output is padded with spaces for alignment.

desc: Show Unicode code points, category, and details for each character
how_to: Paste text to see Unicode details for each character.

desc: Count emojis in text, show which emojis are used and how many
how_to: Paste text with emojis to see emoji count and distribution.

desc: Comprehensive text analysis: readability score, grade level, sentiment indicators
how_to: Paste text for a full analysis report including Flesch reading ease, lexical density, and more.

desc: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes of text
how_to: Type text and instantly see its hash in multiple formats. Uses Web Crypto API.

desc: Generate UUID v4, UUID v7, or bulk UUIDs
how_to: Choose UUID version and quantity. Copy results with one click.

desc: Add or remove indentation from each line of text
how_to: Paste text and choose indent size or dedent amount.

desc: Format CSV data into aligned columns for readability
how_to: Paste CSV text and see it formatted into aligned columns.

desc: Generate acronyms from phrases, extract first letters of each word
how_to: Type a phrase and see its acronym with or without dots.

desc: Calculate elapsed time between two moments, or convert between time units
how_to: Enter start and end times, or a duration value to convert between seconds/minutes/hours.

desc: Generate random lorem ipsum or custom-length random text for testing
how_to: Choose text type (lorem ipsum, random words) and length. Copy output.

desc: Convert text to Morse code and Morse code back to text
how_to: Type text to convert to Morse code (·−·· ·−−−), or paste Morse to decode.
